name: Semantic Cache
description: Stores LLM responses keyed by embedding similarity so that semantically equivalent queries are served from cache, reducing inference latency and token cost without sacrificing answer quality.

evidence.notes: Continuous Semantic Caching for Low-Cost LLM Serving (2026) -- first rigorous theoretical framework for semantic LLM caching in continuous query space using kernel ridge regression.
vCache -- reliable and efficient semantic prompt caching; active research prototype with published benchmarks.

timeline.details: Type adjusted from basic to unique
